title: Frequently Asked Questions
description: Quick answers to common ZXBrick player questions covering onboarding, progression, coins, leaderboards, and support for repeated sessions.
summary: Find practical answers for progression, controls, and shared systems.

sections.heading: Common questions
paragraphs: Use these pages to jump to the relevant section when your question is about gameplay or progression systems.

faq.question: Is ZXBrick part of the ZX Series?
faq.answer: Yes. ZXBrick is part of the [ZX Series](/zx-series).

faq.question: Does ZXBrick include BarkinMad Coins?
faq.answer: Yes. ZXBrick supports shared BarkinMad Coins through the ZX Series model.

faq.question: What are the available ZXBrick achievements?
faq.answer: The site lists play-count and brick-destruction achievements. Check [Achievements](/apps/zxbrick/achievements) for the current list.

faq.question: Does ZXBrick support leaderboards?
faq.answer: Yes. The current published category is the highest score leaderboard.

featureShowcases.heading: ZXBrick quick answers
featureShowcases.summary: The FAQ gives players quick answers about ZXBrick features, progression, support, and current guide status.
body: This matters because players often arrive with one specific question. The page should answer quickly and then point them to the deeper guide when needed.
Players use this page when they need support context without reading every guide page.
bullets: Links common questions back to the guide.
Keeps public wording clear and release-safe.

image.caption: ZXBrick FAQ artwork supports support and quick-answer context.
